title: DO NOT MERGE: Mitr’s zstd:chunked integration branch
body:
- Primarily to keep track what exactly is in flight, it’s getting a bit frenetic
- Also so that I can continue from here tomorrow without having to recreate this.
- And to run the tests in the standard environment and not my manually-created VM

```release-note
None
```

Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Note to self: If/after https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2156 merges, this PR will need to re-enable `enable_partial_images`.
Follow #24419 instead, we went with the “costly” correct approach.
